title: End to End Healthcare Platform
desc:
I’m building a comprehensive marketplace that lets patients book clinic visits with verified doctors, nurses, caregivers, physiotherapists, and other licensed professionals. Each practitioner will have a profile where they can upload credentials, describe services, set their own fees, and update real-time availability.  

Patients must be able to search using the filters we care about most—specialty, location, price, rating, and preferred language—then reserve an in-clinic appointment in just a few taps. (Video consultations and home-care bookings will follow, so keep the architecture flexible for those additions.)  

Every patient account will include an encrypted medical file that stores reports, prescriptions, allergies, medications, surgical history, and ongoing treatments. I also want integrated chat, secure payments, automated visit reminders, post-consult reviews, an emergency-contact feature, and a section where clinics or hospitals can post job openings to the same practitioner pool. Revenue should flow through commission on each booking plus optional subscription plans for premium exposure.  

Please outline the stack you propose, how you will handle authentication and data privacy, and the milestones you’d recommend from UX wireframes through to a launch-ready iOS/Android app and web dashboard.

title: Client Acquisition Partner for Software Projects
desc:
Commission Software Client Hunter Needed
Details
Hiring Client Hunters (Commission-Based)

We're looking for experienced Client Hunters / Business Development Partners who can bring software development projects.

Our Services
AI Integration & Automation
Custom Web Apps (PHP, Wordpress, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, AWS,React)
WordPress Website Development
E-commerce Development
Ride Sharing Systems
Trek & Travel Management Systems
OTT & Video Streaming Platforms
Custom SaaS & Enterprise Software
Compensation

4% commission on the total project value.

If you have experience finding and closing software development clients, we'd love to work with you.

To apply, send us:
Your client acquisition approach.
Your past experience and results.
Any relevant references or success stories.

Deliverables I expect from you
• Qualified lead details: contact, project outline, estimated budget.
• Signed agreement or official purchase order initiating our discovery sprint.
• Warm handover to my engineering team (intro email or joint call).

A lead is considered “won” once the first invoice is paid—at that point your upfront bonus lands, and the commission meter starts running.

When you apply, briefly outline your acquisition playbook, share a few concrete wins, and tell me how soon you can introduce our first custom-web-app prospect. Let’s grow together.
Skills Required

title: Advanced AI-Powered Desktop Assistant Development -- 2
desc:
# JARVIS AI Assistant – Main Application

This `main.py` file is the central controller of an advanced AI-powered desktop assistant named **JARVIS**. It connects the user interface, Google's Gemini Live API, voice communication, memory system, and a wide range of automation tools into one intelligent assistant.

The application supports **real-time voice conversations**, allowing users to interact naturally through speech while JARVIS listens, thinks, responds with AI-generated voice, and manages conversation history. It automatically reconnects if the connection is interrupted and continuously processes audio input and output for a seamless experience.

The assistant is capable of performing numerous desktop and web automation tasks, including:

* Opening applications and websites
* Controlling the browser
* Managing files and folders
* Searching the web
* Playing and summarizing YouTube videos
* Sending messages
* Setting reminders
* Checking weather
* Controlling Windows settings
* Taking screenshots and analyzing the screen
* Running developer tools
* Managing games, flights, and desktop organization

These capabilities are exposed through structured AI function declarations, allowing Gemini to intelligently choose the correct tool based on the user's request.

A built-in long-term memory system enables JARVIS to remember important user information, personalize future conversations, and update memory automatically when meaningful information is detected. The assistant als

title: Excel workshop for IT team – Ayush Thakur
desc:
Hi,

I'm Ayush. I've built similar training materials before – mostly for small teams who need to get better at Excel without sitting through boring theory. I can put together a complete package for your 3-hour workshop.

Here's what I'll deliver:

PowerPoint deck – Clean, visual, and easy to follow. Covers core formulas (IF, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, SUMIFS, TEXT functions) and pivot tables. Each slide has a clear takeaway and a prompt for the hands-on exercise.
Demo files and datasets – Realistic IT data. Think log files with timestamps and error codes, ticket metrics (open/closed by priority, SLA breaches), system inventory lists with hardware specs. Everything your team can manipulate during the session.
Facilitator notes – Step-by-step. Timings for each section (e.g., 20 mins intro, 40 mins formulas, 30 mins pivot tables, etc.). Included prompts, common pitfalls, and questions to ask. Makes it easy for whoever's teaching.
Digital handbook – A searchable PDF with one page per formula. Each page has the syntax, an IT-relevant example, and a practice exercise with a worked solution. Your team can keep it for reference later.
I've done this for a couple of IT departments before – they liked that I used their own kind of data. I can show you a sample slide and one exercise outline if you want to see the style.

Let me know if you're interested and I can send that over. Also happy to discuss timeline and pricing.

Best,
Ayush Thakur

title: AAC Blocks Market Research
desc:
I need a concise yet thorough research report that tells me exactly how Autoclaved Aerated Concrete (AAC) blocks are performing in my local market. The core of the study is three–fold:  

• Measure current and projected market demand for AAC blocks within the defined local region.  
• Map the competitive landscape—identify key players, their capacity, pricing strategies, product positioning and any recent moves that could shift market share.  
• Explain the sales channels that actually move AAC blocks here (direct sales, distributors, builders & contractors, large retail chains, etc.) and highlight gaps I could exploit.

Alongside those commercial insights, I still need a short technical refresher on AAC itself so that any strategic recommendation is grounded in reality—cover essential material properties, a summary of the usual manufacturing process and a note on environmental advantages that matter to buyers.

Deliver the findings in a clear, well-structured PDF (tables, graphs and short commentary sections are ideal) plus an editable spreadsheet containing all raw data, sources and calculations. Cite every source so I can verify figures.

title: Urgent B2B LinkedIn Leads
desc:
I need help fast with a focused LinkedIn outreach campaign aimed at decision-makers in medium-sized (51-500 employee) Technology and Healthcare companies. The objective is simple: supply me with a clean, verified list of prospects who have buying authority and are likely to take a discovery call in the next few weeks.

Here’s what the assignment looks like from my side. You’ll work with Sales Navigator (or a comparable tool), identify the right people, verify contact details, and deliver a spreadsheet I can upload straight into my CRM. If you also handle the initial connection request and one short follow-up message, even better—I’ll share messaging guidelines or you can propose copy.

Deliverables  
• A Google Sheet (or Excel) containing for each prospect: name, title, company, company size confirmation, LinkedIn profile URL, work email, and location.  
• Verified data: bounce rate below 5 % after a NeverBounce (or similar) check.  
• Only decision-maker titles—no middle management unless the role clearly carries budget authority.  
• Tech and Healthcare sectors only, aligned with the brief above.  

Acceptance criteria  
• Data meets the verification threshold and matches the industry, company-size, and seniority filters.  
• Sheet is complete and ready to import.  
• All work delivered within the agreed timeline; I’m aiming for a quick turnaround.  

If you have run comparable campaigns, let me know which tools you prefer and share a small, redacted sample so I can see you

title: AI-Hydro-Pneumatic Suspension Control Development
desc:
Scope of Work
AI/ML-Based Predictive Active Hydro-Pneumatic Suspension Control Software Development
Project Overview

We are developing an Active Hydro-Pneumatic Suspension System for a heavy off-road defence/mining vehicle. The mechanical suspension, hydraulic system, proportional valves, ECU hardware, and sensors are being developed in-house.

The objective of this project is to develop an AI/ML-based suspension control algorithm capable of operating in two configurations:

Configuration A: Accelerometer-based Active Suspension Control.
Configuration B (Optional): LiDAR-assisted Predictive Active Suspension Control.

The software shall automatically control the proportional hydraulic valves to achieve optimum ride comfort, vehicle stability, and suspension performance.

Scope of Development
Phase 1 – Sensor Integration

Develop software interfaces for the following sensors:

Mandatory
3-axis Accelerometer
Gas Pressure Sensor (Hydro-Pneumatic Suspension)
Suspension Position / Displacement Sensor
Vehicle Speed Signal
Optional
Steering Angle Sensor
LiDAR Sensor (for predictive mode)

Note: Hydraulic pressure sensors, GPS and RGB cameras are not part of the present scope.

Phase 2 – Active Suspension Control

Develop the suspension controller capable of:

Processing accelerometer signals
Estimating road-induced vibration
Determining suspension response requirements
Controlling proportional hydraulic valves
Regulating valve opening and closing continuously
Optimizing damping cha

title: Women’s Sales & Marketing Lead
desc:
I am assembling an all-women sales and marketing force at Zipo and need a dynamic leader to guide it from our Bangalore headquarters. Your first mission will be to design and execute winning sales strategies for our services portfolio, concentrating on online (e-commerce) and direct sales channels. As the team grows, you will naturally take charge of day-to-day coaching and campaign oversight, but the immediate priority is strategy creation and early-stage revenue lift.

This is a full-time, on-site role. You will relocate to Bangalore, where comfortable accommodation and daily meals are ready so you can settle in quickly. Compensation starts at ₹20,000 per month with clear incentive slabs tied to revenue performance.

Ideal profile  
• A track record of crafting and rolling out sales strategies that generate measurable growth for service-based offerings.  
• Hands-on familiarity with digital tools such as CRMs, marketing-automation suites, social ad managers, or Shopify-style platforms, because our first wins will come online before field sales scales.  
• Leadership that inspires women professionals to own ambitious targets and grow into future managers themselves.

First-90-day deliverables  
1. A detailed sales playbook listing target segments, messaging, channel mix, and forecasts.  
2. A weekly pipeline-review rhythm inside our chosen CRM.  
3. Launch and optimisation of two pilot campaigns—one e-commerce led, one direct outreach—that together deliver at least 100 quali

title: Sales Partner Mobile Locking Service
desc:
Freelance Sales Partners Required – Google DLC Based Mobile Locking Solution

 Project Overview

We are looking for motivated freelance Sales Partners and Business Development Executives to promote and sell our Google DLC Based Mobile Locking Solution to mobile retailers, distributors, and service centers across India.

This is a performance-driven opportunity for individuals with strong communication and sales skills who want to build a long-term income through product sales.

 About the Product

Our solution is a Google DLC Based Mobile Locking System designed for the mobile retail industry. It enables retailers to offer advanced mobile locking solutions through a simple and efficient process.

 Product Highlights

 Google DLC Based Mobile Locking Solution
 Designed for the mobile retail market
 Easy onboarding and sales process
 Sales training and product guidance provided
 Dedicated support for sales partners

Responsibilities

 Identify and approach mobile retailers and distributors.
 Explain the product and its benefits.
Generate new orders and expand the customer network.
 Maintain regular communication with retailers.
 Submit sales updates and follow up with prospects.

Who Can Apply

 Freelance Sales Professionals
 Business Development Executives
Field Sales Representatives
Marketing Professionals
 Individuals with experience in the mobile industry (preferred but not mandatory)

 Payment Structure

This is a commission-based freelance opportunity

Earn commission on

title: ISO 27001 Internal Audit Support
desc:
I’m preparing my organisation for an upcoming ISO 27001 certification assessment and now need an experienced professional to perform the mandatory internal audit. The Information Security Management System is already in place; what I require is an objective review that tests our controls, documents the findings and guides our remediation work so we meet every clause of the standard.

Your assignment will cover the full audit cycle—from planning through to the final report—conducted remotely via interviews, document review and evidence sampling. You should be a certified ISO 27001 Lead Auditor (or equivalent) and comfortable using typical audit tools such as Annex A control checklists, risk registers and statement-of-applicability mapping.

Deliverables  
• Audit plan and schedule aligned to ISO 27001:2022 clauses  
• Complete audit checklist with objective evidence recorded  
• Formal internal audit report outlining conformity, non-conformities, observations and opportunities for improvement  
• Recommended corrective-action log ranked by priority  
• Closing meeting to walk through results and answer questions

Acceptance Criteria  
• Findings reference the exact clause or control tested  
• Non-conformities are written in ISO auditor style (objective evidence + requirement + gap)  
• All documents supplied in editable formats (Word/Excel)  
• Work completed within 1 week of project kick-off

If you have the right credentials and can start promptly, let’s discuss next steps

title: WhatsApp Bulk Messaging Specialist Needed
desc:
I run ongoing customer-engagement campaigns and already hold an opted-in contact list; what I need now is a WhatsApp expert who can unlock the full power of bulk messaging and guide me through securing the coveted green-tick business verification.  

Your role begins with a clear audit of my current WhatsApp Business setup and finishes only when my messages, which mainly drive traffic through embedded links, are landing consistently without getting throttled or flagged. Along the way, I expect practical advice on template approval, opt-in compliance, daily send limits, and content best practices so that every outreach stays inside WhatsApp’s policies.

Relevant, hands-on experience with the WhatsApp Business API (or platforms such as 360dialog, Twilio, WATI, Gupshup, etc.) is essential because I’ll rely on you to:

• Configure or fine-tune the bulk-sending tool, connect it to my CRM, and import the existing list safely.  
• Obtain or fast-track the official green-tick verification and walk me through the ongoing requirements to keep it.  
• Build at least one live campaign—including template creation, scheduling, and delivery testing—so we can confirm open and click-through metrics in real time.  
• Hand over clear, replicable instructions and any custom scripts or webhooks you deploy.

If you have a proven track record of high-volume WhatsApp delivery, understand the difference between user-initiated and business-initiated messages, and can optimise for both reach and engage

title: Australian Commercial Structural Engineer
desc:
I’m launching a new-build commercial project in Australia and need a licensed structural engineer to carry it from concept to hand-over. The role covers three core tasks: producing certified design drawings, running full structural analysis, and providing ongoing construction supervision to ensure the work on site matches what we have on paper.

Because this is a ground-up build, everything must comply with the National Construction Code and relevant Australian Standards for steel and concrete. I usually coordinate in Revit and AutoCAD, so fluency with those—or compatible BIM and analysis tools such as ETABS or SPACE GASS—is important for a smooth exchange with the architect and services consultants.

Deliverables
• Certified calculation package ready for council lodgement  
• Detailed engineering drawings in PDF and DWG/IFC formats  
• Periodic site reports and a final compliance certificate

When you respond, please confirm:
• Your Australian registration number and the state or territory it covers  
• The analysis and drafting software you plan to use  
• A proposed timeline for preliminary, IFC, and AFC releases, plus your approach to site or remote supervision

I’m ready to move quickly once the right engineer is on board and will be available for fast clarifications along the way.

title: Commercial Concrete Pool Engineering Australia
desc:
I need a complete reinforced-concrete swimming pool design for a site in Queensland that will operate as a commercial facility. The concept has not been locked into a specific shape yet, so I am open to your professional advice on the most efficient geometry; what matters is that the structure meets Australian Standards (AS 3600, AS /NZS 1170 series, and local council requirements) and is robust enough to handle continuous public use.  Australia

Because the pool will include a diving board, I expect special attention to deeper-end load cases, impact and shear reinforcement, and the detailing of the platform anchorage. Please allow for the additional wall thickness, stepped floor profile, and any anti-slip finishes that the code requires around diving areas.  

I will supply the site survey, soil report, and preliminary concept sketches once the project starts. Your task is to turn those inputs into a fully engineered package that a certifier can sign off without major revisions. AutoCAD or Revit drawings are preferred, and I am comfortable reviewing models in BIM 360 if that speeds collaboration. STAAD, RAPT, or equivalent structural analysis files should accompany the calculations.

Deliverables  
• Signed structural calculations with load-case summaries  
• Reinforcement schedules and bending schedules (PDF + DWG)  
• General arrangement plans, elevations, and sections ready for council submission  
• Details for diving board footings, brackets, and splash-zone finishes

title: Rational Thinking Awareness Video Series
desc:
I’m building an educational YouTube channel dedicated to personal development, with every episode centred on clearer, more rational thinking and everyday awareness. I need a creative partner who can take each topic from concept through to a polished, upload-ready video.

Here’s what the collaboration looks like:

• Research and outline each lesson so the core idea is accessible but never oversimplified.  
• Write an engaging script that balances practical examples with solid reasoning.  
• Produce and edit the video in a style suited to YouTube—clean visuals, concise pacing, royalty-free graphics or stock where needed, and clear voice-over (yours or sourced).  
• Deliver the final file in 1080p, with chapter markers and a short description ready for the video’s upload page.

A basic knowledge of cognitive science, logical fallacies, or behavioural psychology will help keep the content accurate and compelling, though I’m happy to supply reference material. Consistency matters; I want the look, tone, and branding to feel unified across the series.

If you’re passionate about educational media and confident you can turn rational thinking concepts into videos viewers actually finish, let’s talk about the first episode and set a schedule for the rest of the series.
